productDisplayName: John Players Men Polo Black T-shirt
description: Style note Crafted from cotton knit, this polo T-shirt from john players is designed to offer exemplary comfort and style. The vibrant colour ups your energy factor, while the ribbed cuffs sit snug on well-toned arms. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Product Details Black polo neck T-shirt, chest buttoned placket, has short grey right sleeve and short white left sleeve with rubber print on it, rubber print on the left chest, applique on the front and a vented hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Size and Fit Slim Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
